ops.text:
RESULTS (stage 2/3 complete). Spend ~$1.43 opus (215/215 parsed, 224s, est 191k in + 19k out tok); under $12 cap. All 4 preds files 215 rows (202 single + 13 multi), verified.

SPLIT: train 1803 / eval 215 (202 single-select + 13 multi-select); 48 eval sessions vs 416 train, zero session overlap.

SINGLE-SELECT (n=202) accuracy / ECE / Brier(multiclass):
  B1_majority_header    acc 0.579 [0.510,0.653]  ECE 0.052  Brier 0.602
  B1_majority_position  acc 0.574 [0.505,0.644]  ECE 0.026  Brier 0.597
  B2_retrieval_opus     acc 0.559 [0.490,0.634]  ECE 0.103  Brier 0.585
  B3_calibrated_logreg  acc 0.579 [0.510,0.649]  ECE 0.168  Brier 0.602

MULTI-SELECT (n=13; only 5 positive option-slots of 42) subset-match / per-option ROC-AUC / PR-AUC:
  B1_header / B1_position  0.615 / 0.568 / 0.141 (predicts all-empty; 8/13 true sets are custom-only=empty)
  B2_retrieval_opus        0.154 / 0.524 / 0.238
  B3_calibrated_logreg     0.231 / 0.649 / 0.253

KEY FINDING (difficulty floor): top-1 accuracy for ALL baselines sits at the position-majority prior (~0.57-0.58). B1_position 0.574 == exactly 116/202 = frac(pick==option-0), i.e. "always predict option 0". Retrieval+opus (0.559) does NOT beat that trivial prior and is marginally below it; B3 logreg ties majority. All accuracy 95% bootstrap CIs [~0.49,0.65] overlap heavily -> no baseline distinguishable from the majority floor at this n. Best proper-score (Brier) is opus 0.585 (marginal); best confidence-ECE is B1_position 0.026. B3's high ECE 0.168 is an honest artifact of row-normalizing temperature-scaled independent per-candidate sigmoids into a multiclass distribution (calibration is proper at the per-candidate binary level, temperature=1.11, but re-normalization un-calibrates the joint). Opus pick==argmax(dist) for all 202 (faithful). NO promote/kill verdict (baselines only; instrument card gates verdicts).

ECE reuses cc_steer.retrain.lexical.ece:217 (confidence-calibration form); pr_auc & fit_temperature/probs_from_logits reused from same module. Scripts: /Users/yasyf/.cc-steer/experiments/E24/scripts/{e24_common,e24_baseline1_3,e24_baseline2_opus,e24_metrics}.py. Verify lane can re-derive from attached preds via e24_metrics.py.
